title: Comprehensive Output
learningGoal: The learner will verbally construct sentences combining multiple grammar points, including reasons, permissions, potentials, and conditionals.
instructions: Translate the English prompts into Japanese verbally. You will need to recall various grammar structures from the past three months.

contentItems.text: Speak clearly and confidently. Remember how to form 'kara', 'te mo ii', and 'tara'.

speakingPrompt: Translate: 1) Because I studied, I can speak. 2) May I drink? 3) If I go to Japan, I want to eat sushi.

subTasks.prompt: Give a reason and potential. Say: 'Because I studied, I can speak.'

sampleResponse.targetText: べんきょうしましたから、はなせます。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: Because I studied, I can speak.

subTasks.prompt: Ask for permission. Say: 'May I drink?'

sampleResponse.targetText: のんでも いいですか。

subTasks.prompt: State a condition and desire. Say: 'If I go to Japan, I want to eat sushi.'

sampleResponse.targetText: にほんに いったら、すしが たべたいです。
sampleResponse.transliteration: Nihon ni ittara, sushi ga tabetai desu.
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: If I go to Japan, I want to eat sushi.

scenarioContext.targetText: にほんごで はなして ください。

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: べんきょうしましたから、はなせます。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: Because I studied, I can speak.

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: のんでも いいですか。
にほんに いったら、すしが たべたいです。
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Nihon ni ittara, sushi ga tabetai desu.
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: If I go to Japan, I want to eat sushi.

expectedSpeakingPoints: Say Nonde mo ii desu ka
Say Nihon ni ittara sushi ga tabetai desu
acceptableParaphrases: Accept 'Benkyou shita kara' (plain form before kara).
adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: べんきょうしましたから、はなせます。のんでも いいですか。にほんに いったら、すしが たべたいです。

feedbackRules.onPass: Fantastic speaking! You are truly speaking Japanese now.
feedbackRules.onFail: Review the core conjugations: Te-form, Tara-form, and Potential form.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good try! Remember that 'want to eat' is 'tabetai', and the object takes 'ga' (sushi ga tabetai).

audioAssets.audioTranscript: べんきょうしましたから、はなせます。のんでも いいですか。にほんに いったら、すしが たべたいです。

hintText: Link clauses carefully. 'Iku' becomes 'Ittara' (If I go).
